overall.description: A cinematic third-person scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character sitting on an urban bench during golden hour, eating and drinking while observing moderate traffic flow on a multi-lane street surrounded by futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner seating area overlooking multi-lane traffic

events.description: pedestrian crosses the street from left to right in the mid-ground
character raises cup to mouth to take a drink while seated

agents.ego_description: seated on a concrete bench, holding a cup and periodically drinking while watching city traffic pass by

notable_agents.action: steady stream of cars and trucks passing along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large purple neon sign mounted on the side of a commercial building
tall glass and steel building with green illuminated sections and construction scaffolding
raised roadway or monorail track structure crossing above street level
line of leafy trees separating the pedestrian area from the street
raised concrete structure with plants where the character is seated
horizontal blue metal railing along the edge of the seating area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a warm golden hour evening in a futuristic downtown district. The camera remains stationary behind a character seated on a concrete bench, overlooking a busy multi-lane street. Neon signs glow on distant skyscrapers while a steady stream of traffic flows past. The character casually drinks from a cup, observing the urban environment as pedestrians occasionally cross the street and vehicles pass by in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary perspective of a futuristic downtown district during the warm glow of golden hour. It begins behind a character seated on a concrete bench, establishing a quiet moment of observation overlooking a busy multi-lane street. As the character casually drinks from a cup, the camera focuses on the steady flow of traffic and pedestrians moving through the urban environment. The scene then expands to reveal the distant skyscrapers where neon signs begin to glow more prominently against the evening sky.
